title: Metro Deco
description: More decorations and recipes for your Minecraft metro and train stations!
body:
# About
This mod focuses on bringing more decorations and recipes for your Minecraft metro/subway and train stations! 
**(This mod is under development and will receive updates, eventually)**

Current features:
- Ceiling Light block (3 sizes)
- 4 benches variations (only decorative at the moment)
- 7 colored light panels
- 4 colored steel girders

(I recommend using JEI or some equivalent mod to see all the recipes: https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

# Images
